text:
TENCENT ANNOUNCES 2023 ANNUAL AND FOURTH QUARTER RESULTS
FY2023 Financial Highlights
Revenues: +10% YoY, gross profit: +23% YoY, non-IFRS[1] profit attributable to equity holders of the Company: +36% YoY
Total revenues were RMB609.0 billion, up 10% over 2022.
Gross profit was RMB293.1 billion, up 23% YoY.
On a non-IFRS basis, which is intended to reflect core earnings by excluding certain one-time and/or non-cash items:
Operating profit* was RMB191.9 billion, up 34% YoY. Operating margin* increased to 32% from 26% last year.
Profit for the year was RMB161.7 billion, up 36% YoY. Net margin increased to 27% from 21% last year.
Profit attributable to equity holders of the Company for the year was RMB157.7 billion, up 36% YoY.
Basic earnings per share were RMB16.678. Diluted earnings per share were RMB16.320.
